articles.title: Pentagon to Use Palantir AI as Core Military System
articles.description: In a move that locks in long-term use of Palantir's weapons-targeting technology across the U.S. military, Palantir's Maven artificial intelligence system will become an official program of record, Deputy Secretary of War Steve Feinberg said in a letter to Pentagon leaders.
articles.content: Palantir's Maven artificial intelligence system will become an official program of record, Deputy Secretary of War Steve Feinberg said in a letter to Pentagon leaders, a move that locks in long-term use of Palantir's weapons-targeting technology acro... [3580 chars]

articles.title: NIC students win gold at state competition
articles.description: NIC students Chris Brandt won gold and Damien Nord-Fencl won silver in Collision Damage Appraisal; Zoe Hunt won gold and Emily Vig won silver in Automotive Refinishing Technology; Destiny Shamblin won bronze in Collision Repair Technology; and Callitia McClintock won gold in Prepared Speech.
articles.content: Six North Idaho College students medaled at the Idaho SkillsUSA State Leadership and Skills Conference on March 5 and 6 at the College of Western Idaho’s Micron Building in Nampa, with three students winning gold, two taking home silver and one recei... [2025 chars]

articles.description: Pentagon designates Palantir's AI Maven system as core military technology, enhancing data analysis and targeting capabilities.

articles.title: Make life easier for taxpayers, use technology to check evasion: FM to IT officers
articles.description: NEW DELHI, Mar 20 : Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman on Friday asked income tax officers to make life easier for assesses and use technology to catch those evading tax wilfully. Addressing the ‘PRARAMBH 2026: Nationwide Awareness Campaign on the Income Tax Act, 2025’, the minister also exuded confidence that the Income Tax Act, 2025, effective from April 1, will certainly set the trend for making India a very tax-friendly country. “Make paying tax so easy that honesty becomes the natural […]
articles.content:
NEW DELHI, Mar 20 : Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman on Friday asked income tax officers to make life easier for assesses and use technology to catch those evading tax wilfully.
Addressing the ‘PRARAMBH 2026: Nationwide Awareness Campaign on the I... [1668 chars]

articles.title: Palantir's AI System Secures Permanent Role with U.S. Military
articles.description: Deputy Secretary of Defense Steve Feinberg has announced the designation of Palantir's Maven AI system as a program of record for the U.S. military. This move ensures long-term usage and funding, integrating AI-driven command-and-control technology across military branches to enhance decision-making capabilities.
articles.content:
In a strategic shift, Deputy Secretary of Defense Steve Feinberg declared that Palantir's Maven AI system will be a designated program of record for the U.S. military in a bid for long-term integration.
This pivotal decision is set to provide sustain... [343 chars]

articles.title: Exclusive: Pentagon to adopt Palantir AI as core US military system, memo says
articles.description: Palantir’s Maven artificial intelligence system will become an official program of record, Deputy Secretary of Defense Steve ​Feinberg said in a letter to Pentagon leaders, a move that locks in long-term use of Palantir’s weapons-targeting technology across ‌the U.S. military.
articles.content: In the March 9 letter to senior Pentagon leaders and U.S. military commanders, Feinberg said embedding Palantir’s Maven Smart System would provide warfighters “with the latest tools necessary to detect, deter, and dominate our adversaries in all doma... [3329 chars]

articles.title: Devastating Factory Blaze in Daejeon Unleashes Chaos and Tragedy
articles.description: A catastrophic fire at an auto parts factory in Daejeon, South Korea, left ten dead and injured at least 59. Rescue operations, involving advanced technology and hundreds of personnel, continue while authorities investigate the cause. President Lee Jae Myung mobilized full support for containment and recovery efforts.
articles.content:
A devastating fire tore through an auto parts factory in Daejeon, South Korea, claiming ten lives and leaving scores injured. The blaze, believed to be fueled by an explosion, has prompted extensive rescue operations.
More than 500 emergency services... [429 chars]

articles.title: DC inaugurates Space Lab at Phillaur school
articles.description: To provide students with the latest technology and knowledge related to space and science, Deputy Commissioner Dr Himanshu Aggarwal and Vice-Chairman of Punjab School Education Board, Mohali, Principal Prem Kumar, today inaugurated a Space Laboratory at the School of Eminence, Phillaur.
articles.content: To provide students with the latest technology and knowledge related to space and science, Deputy Commissioner Dr Himanshu Aggarwal and Vice-Chairman of Punjab School Education Board, Mohali, Principal Prem Kumar, today inaugurated a Space Laboratory... [1792 chars]

articles.title: 3 men accused of conspiring to smuggle US artificial intelligence to China: prosecutors
articles.description: Three men were charged with conspiring to unlawfully divert U.S. artificial intelligence technology to China, according to prosecutors.
articles.content:
Three men were charged with conspiring to unlawfully divert billions of dollars worth of U.S. artificial intelligence technology to China, according to the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of New York.
